<!--
Thanks for proposing an edit to a ZAO paper. A few things that help this get
reviewed and merged fast - see docs/PAPER-EDITING.md for the full workflow.
-->

## What paper does this change?

<!-- e.g. Technical Whitepaper, what-is-the-zao, WaveWarZ draft -->

## What changed and why

<!-- One or two sentences. If you're fixing a fact (a number, a date, a
contract address), say what the old text said and what the correct value
is, plus how you know. -->

## Source for any factual claim

<!-- Every factual claim (a number, a date, a percentage, a quote) needs a
source someone else could check - a link, a doc, an on-chain address. If
this PR only changes wording/voice and no facts, write "no new facts." -->

## Attribution

<!-- Your name or handle, exactly as you'd like it credited in the paper's
"Editors" line. -->
